positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for harry_conclusion_positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u32,negated_conjecture,
    ~vertebrate(harry)).

cnf(u35,negated_conjecture,
    ~animal_with_backbone(harry)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~vertebrate(X0) | animal_with_backbone(X0)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    is_a(harry,bee)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ~is_a(X0,queen_bee) | is_a(X0,bee)).

cnf(u24,axiom,
    bee != queen_bee).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    ~animal_with_backbone(X0) | reproduces_by_mating(X0)).

cnf(u39,axiom,
    ~reproduces_by_mating(harry)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~is_a(X0,bee) | ~reproduces_by_mating(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define animal(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define invertebrate(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
